name: Nicole
description: A 20-minute AMRAP of a 400m run and max-rep pull-ups, scored by rounds plus total pull-up reps — pull-up capacity becomes the limiting factor as fatigue accumulates.
source_notes: crossfit.com/faq/wod (official CrossFit FAQ, 'Explain The Workouts with Names (the Girls)?'), retrieved 2026-07-08
